case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. JEREMY COLLEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT COLLEN, JEREMY
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT COLLEN, JEREMY DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED JAN-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLLEN, JEREMY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COLLEN, JEREMY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLEN, JEREMY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1188 MISSION STREET, APARTMENT #2021, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLLEN, JEREMY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $99.97 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COLLEN, JEREMY
